steps.title: Recognize the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: The first sentence shows that these methods handle thousands of shapes; the second explains why they're economical. The cause-and-effect relationship is the decisive clue.

steps.title: Match the transitional word
steps.content:
”As such” (“therefore”) signals that the economic advantage follows from the lighter processing load.
“Instead” implies contrast, “For example” implies exemplification, and “Specifically” implies narrowing—none show causation.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
